message:
✨ Compliance dashboard gold treatment: drill-down modals and click-through (#2157)

* ✨ Compliance dashboard gold treatment: drill-down modals, click-through, and enriched descriptions

Bring all compliance cards up to the OPA gold standard with interactive
drill-down capabilities:

- Enrich useTrivy/useKubescape hooks with per-item detail data (images, controls)
- Add KyvernoDetailModal with policies list and per-namespace report bars
- Add TrivyDetailModal with per-image vulnerability table and severity bars
- Add KubescapeDetailModal with score gauge, framework breakdown, controls table
- Wire KyvernoPolicies card with click-through to detail modal and sample policies mission
- Wire TrivyScan/KubescapeScan/PolicyViolations cards with click-through to modals
- Make FleetComplianceHeatmap cells clickable to open relevant tool modal
- Add OPA Gatekeeper install mission to heatmap
- Make ComplianceDrift entries clickable to open relevant tool modal
- Make CrossClusterPolicyComparison rows clickable with detail modal
- Add RefreshIndicator to ComplianceDrift and CrossClusterPolicyComparison
- Add enriched card descriptions and missing locale entries for heatmap/drift/comparison

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Address PR review findings: accessibility, comments, and defensive guards

- Fix WCAG: add Space key support to all onKeyDown handlers (Enter + Space)
- Fix WCAG: add role/tabIndex/onKeyDown to CrossClusterPolicyComparison table rows
- Fix click target: TrivyScan/KubescapeScan respect selectedClusters filter
- Fix JSDoc: ComplianceDrift says "mean" not "median" (matches actual stats())
- Fix JSDoc: FleetComplianceHeatmap lists 3 columns not 4 (OPA not rendered)
- Fix locale: remove false "Click for per-tool breakdown" from compliance_score
- Fix duplicate: remove scoreRingColor (identical to scoreColor) in KubescapeDetailModal
- Extract magic number: DRIFT_STDDEV_THRESHOLD constant for deviation threshold
- Add defensive optional chaining on search filters in KyvernoDetailModal
- Add defensive || '' guards on search filters in TrivyDetailModal

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

+interface KyvernoDetailModalProps { + isOpen: boolean + onClose: () => void + clusterName: string + status: KyvernoClusterStatus + onRefresh: () => void + isRefreshing?: boolean +} + +export function KyvernoDetailModal({ + isOpen, + onClose, + clusterName, + status, + onRefresh, + isRefreshing = false, +}: KyvernoDetailModalProps) { + const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('policies') + const 'reports' as const, label: 'Reports', icon: BarChart3, badge: (status.reports || []).length }, + ] + + // Filter policies by search + const filteredPolicies = useMemo(() => { + const policies = status.policies || [] + if (!search.trim()) return policies + const q = search.toLowerCase() + return policies.filter(p => + p.name?.toLowerCase().includes(q) || + p.category?.toLowerCase().includes(q) || + p.description?.toLowerCase().includes(q) || + p.status?.toLowerCase().includes(q) + ) + }, [status.policies, search]) + + // Sort reports by failures descending + const sortedReports = useMemo(() => { + return [...(status.reports || [])].sort((a, b) => b.fail - a.fail) + }, [status.reports]) + + const handleDeploySamplePolicies = () => { + onClose() + startMission({ + title: 'Deploy Sample Kyverno Policies', + description: 'Deploy audit-mode sample policies to see Kyverno in action', + type: 'deploy', + cluster: clusterName, + initialPrompt: `Deploy 4 sample Kyverno audit-mode policies to cluster "${clusterName}" so I can see the compliance dashboard in action. + +Please create and apply these ClusterPolicies in audit mode (validationFailureAction: Audit): + +1. **require-labels** — Require 'app.kubernetes.io/name' and 'app.kubernetes.io/managed-by' labels on all Pods +2. **disallow-privileged-containers** — Disallow privileged containers (securityContext.privileged: true) +3. **restrict-image-registries** — Only allow images from docker.io, gcr.io, ghcr.io, quay.io +4. **require-resource-limits** — Require CPU and memory resource limits on all containers + +Important: +- Set validationFailureAction to "Audit" on ALL policies (never Enforce) +- Set background: true so existing resources are scanned +- Add appropriate categories via annotations (policies.kyverno.io/category) +- After applying, verify with: kubectl get clusterpolicies +- Check PolicyReports are generated: kubectl get policyreports -A + +Please proceed step by step.`, + context: { clusterName }, + }) + } + + const getStatusColor = (policyStatus: string): 'green' | 'yellow' | 'blue' => { + switch (policyStatus) { + case 'enforcing': return 'green' + case 'audit': return 'yellow' + default: return 'blue' + } + } + + const getCategoryColor = (category: string) => { + switch (category) { + case 'Pod Security': return 'text-red-400' + case 'Best Practices': return 'text-blue-400' + case 'Supply Chain': return 'text-purple-400' + case 'Network': return 'text-cyan-400' + case 'Resources': return 'text-orange-400' + default: return 'text-muted-foreground' + } + } + + return ( + + + } + /> + + setActiveTab(id as KyvernoTab)} + /> + + + {activeTab === 'policies' && ( +
